asha_s_lantern.name: Asha's Lantern
asha_s_lantern.description: A lantern that burns without fuel. Asha's partner made it.
asha_s_lantern.effect: Illuminates hidden paths in dying roots. Asha only gives it if she trusts you.

root_fragment.name: Root Fragment
root_fragment.description: A piece of living root, still faintly pulsing. Can be used to repair minor network damage or traded.
root_fragment.effect: Restores 1 fragment. Can repair simple root breaks.

stored_echo.name: Stored Echo
stored_echo.description: An echo moth's wing, vibrating with a captured conversation. Crack it open to hear the last words someone spoke before their word died.
stored_echo.effect: Reveals a piece of lore. Sometimes contains hints about puzzle solutions or character backstories.

storm_shard.name: Storm Shard
storm_shard.description: A crystallized fragment of Kael's power. Crackles with dangerous energy. Holding it too long makes your own word flicker.
storm_shard.effect: Can be used to force open locked passages. Costs 1 fragment per use. Three shards can be combined into a Storm Key.

luma_s_seed.name: Luma's Seed
luma_s_seed.description: A seed that Luma gives you if you help them believe they're not broken. It doesn't look like much — small, dull, warm. But it's the first thing Luma ever grew on purpose.
luma_s_seed.effect: Plants itself in the First Root during the endgame. One of the keys to the growth ending. Proof that potential isn't wasted.

ren_s_last_echo.name: Ren's Last Echo
ren_s_last_echo.description: The last fragment of Ren's original word, preserved in a small glass vial. Ren doesn't know they still have it. If returned to them, it might bring back enough of who they were to face the end.
ren_s_last_echo.effect: Restores Ren temporarily during the endgame confrontation. Ren can absorb one of Kael's attacks, buying you time. The cost: Ren disappears completely afterward.

the_elder_s_thread.name: The Elder's Thread
the_elder_s_thread.description: A length of glowing thread The Elder gives you before you descend. It connects you back to the village — pull it and they'll know where you are. Cut it and you're truly on your own.
the_elder_s_thread.effect: Allows one emergency retreat to the surface. If kept intact through the endgame, enables the 'connection' ending where the village sends help.
